ingredients.name: Meidaimae Flower Mansion
ingredients.localName: 明大前フラワーマンション
ingredients.address: Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Flower Mansion at Meidaimae is the real-world apartment building that inspired the home of Kadode Koyama's family in the manga. Its distinctive exterior appears in background art throughout the series as the neighborhood anchor of the girls' daily lives.

ingredients.entityContext: Nishi-Eifuku Station on the Keio Inokashira Line is part of the story's Suginami/Setagaya corridor, appearing in background art as one of the small suburban stations that define the characters' daily commuting world.

ingredients.entityContext: Meidaimae Station is the central hub of the story's Setagaya setting, appearing repeatedly as Kadode and Ouran commute to school and wander their neighborhood under the looming alien mothership. The station's streetscape is faithfully reproduced in Inio Asano's detailed backgrounds.
